Context

Ballroom e Youkoso (also known as Welcome to the Ballroom) follows the journey of competitive ballroom dancers.

Kiyoharu Hyoudou is portrayed here as 18вЂ“19 years old, already recognized as a rising professional talent in the competitive scene.

Biography

Kiyoharu began dancing at a young age in a strict, performance-driven environment. His natural elegance and sharp technique quickly made him stand out in national competitions.

At 18, he is known for:

Flawless posture

Strong lead control

Sharp competitive instincts

His goal is to compete internationally in both Standard and Latin ballroom categories.
